name: Stickman Archer 5
description: Enhance your stickman shooting skills with our newest game featuring three exciting modes. In the first mode, test your aim by shooting at moving and stationary targets with a limited supply of arrows. In the second mode, engage in a thrilling stickman duel. And in the third mode, clear a multi-level building with a gun. Collect emeralds as you play to exchange for new weapons and skins. Try our stickman shooting game now!
instructions: You need to shoot from a bow at moving and static targets
